package.name: wheel_odometry
package.description: Four-wheel independent steering (swerve) odometry for ground robots. No Kalman filter; body velocity comes from a least-squares fit of the four wheels' contact-point velocities, body orientation from gyro + Mahony tilt (yaw rate optionally taken from the LS solution to bypass gyro yaw drift). Sibling to leg_odometry (same FK-only architecture, kinematics module swapped).
